rag_rules: Place AGREE assumptions and guarantees in component type annexes when they refer to visible ports and features.
Use valid AGREE syntax for constants, equations, and guarantees within annex agree blocks.
generic_rules: Write guarantees that relate visible outputs to visible inputs in component type contracts.
Only include assumptions and guarantees with concrete bounds or named constants in type scopes.
Ensure AGREE scalar types match AADL data types: int, real, bool.
Avoid using implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Constants and equations in AGREE must declare valid scalar types (int, real, bool).
anti_patterns: Do not reference subcomponent ports in component type annexes unless represented through valid variables.
Do not generate range or equality clauses for Boolean ports without explicit scalar representation.
irrelevant_topics: AADL model fusion and validation repair patterns
